# Data cache

Generated by `python -m data.build_dataset`.

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `namtang-gtfs.zip` | Full Namtang GTFS download (large; gitignored) |
| `routes.json` | Selected BMTA corridors + geometries |
| `osm_routes.json` | OSM Overpass enrichment |
| `traffic_profiles.json` | Hourly traffic indices (Google / ORS / heuristic) |
| `historical.csv` | Training panel for demand & travel models |
| `dataset_meta.json` | Provenance (MOT month, traffic provider, etc.) |
| `mot_bmta_monthly.csv` | MOT monthly ridership snapshot |
| `models.joblib` | Trained demand + travel models (fast cold start on Render) |
| `corridor_traffic_segments.json` | Optional per-stop traffic samples |

Rebuild:
```bash
.venv_bangkok/bin/python -m data.build_dataset --force
```
